evidence.note: Replace with a real public handoff locator; if status becomes VERIFIED, also provide sha256.

candidates.title: Mechanism-aware self-supervised event detector
candidates.claim: Use circadian phase constraints to distinguish behavior events from activity bursts.

anti_collage.mechanism_or_problem_delta: The target shifts from activity recognition to mechanism-constrained event discrimination.
anti_collage.why_not_plain_combination: The phase constraint changes the negative-pair definition and predicts different failure modes.
anti_collage.non_additive_prediction: Performance should improve specifically near confounded high-activity windows, not uniformly.
anti_collage.competing_explanation: A larger encoder may explain gains without the mechanism.
anti_collage.discriminating_test: Ablate phase-aware negatives under matched parameter count.
anti_collage.kill_criterion: No interaction between phase windows and event discrimination after ablation.
anti_collage.boundary_conditions: Only applies when circadian phase is measured or inferable.

transfer.mismatch_risk: phase signals may be weaker in noisy barn environments.

candidates.differentiating_prediction: The method reduces false positives during predictable activity bursts more than during random bursts.
